title: Kurashiki, Okayama — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kurashiki, Okayama: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kurashiki is a city in Okayama with a population of 480,000. A picturesque canal city with a beautifully preserved historic district of white-walled warehouses and willow trees.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
